title: 1-year contract senior executive (Design & Content) #EAT
description:
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES  

  • Manage Graduate College’s social media platforms, including content planning, posting schedules, website and Intranet updates and website revamp.
  • Develop engaging, audience-focused content, including student stories, research highlights, event promotions, and scholarship features.
  • Design and produce marketing materials in a variety of formats, including print, video, and digital platforms.
  • Support outreach initiatives and events management, including postgraduate events, career fairs, and information sessions.
  • Provide administrative support on partnership matters and related activities.

COMPETENCIES AND QUALIFICATION REQUIREMENTS

  • Degree in Mass Communications, Visual Communications, Graphic Design or a related field.
  • Excellent writing, design and visual marketing skills with 2 to 3 years’ working experience in design, video production or marcoms.
  • Able to think creatively,and produce effective design and content work to requirements of projects and programmes.
  • A good understanding and working proficiency of social media and/or digital platforms.

For interested candidates, please send your updated resume:

Email: angelateh@recruitexpress.com.sg

Telegram: @Angie_TL

Whatsapp: +65 96272860

Angela Teh Ling Wei

(CEI No.R1104464)

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License No. 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
